creator: jflowers@ezo.net
text:
With multiple files defined in spamd.conf and referenced in all:
all:\
        :blacklist1:blacklist2:
all files are processed as listed in debug mode but
only the ipnumbers from the last file are evidenced in ipfw table 2.

How-To-Repeat: Use spamd.conf as delivered:
  112279 /usr/local/etc/spamd/work/traplist
   40021 /usr/local/etc/spamd/work/nixspam
     434 /usr/local/etc/spamd/work/chinacidr.txt
     273 /usr/local/etc/spamd/work/koreacidr.txt


#spamd -b -m ipfw
#spamd-setup -b -d -m ipfw
#ipfw table 2 list | wc -l
  268
